action.reasoning: Observation: Diagnostic identified epoch_35.pt with highest noisy val accuracy (56.68%) among all ConvNeXt checkpoints. This likely originates from the same run that achieved best test accuracy 0.7636. Analysis: Submitting this checkpoint for evaluation is the fastest way to check if it surpasses the current best, without additional training overhead. Time budget is limited (0.92h), so we should evaluate before attempting further improvement. Decision: Submit eval with checkpoint checkpoints/epoch_35.pt; no training or file changes in this iteration.
